name: When Two Men Are Fighting the Last Thing I Need Is Some Half-Hearted Assistance!!!!

issues.description: Missing condition: effect should only trigger PowerBoost if revealed card's cost matches chosen cost. Current DSL has no condition checking card cost match.
Incorrect action: DrawCard should be RevealFromHand or equivalent reveal mechanic. The card is revealed FROM OPPONENT'S DECK, not drawn to hand. DrawCard is wrong action type.
Trigger type 'Trigger' is vague. This should be 'Counter' or a sub-effect of the Counter trigger, not a separate independent trigger.
Target scope should include limiting to 'up to 1' card, but current scope ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader may allow multiple selections. Should be more restrictive.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Choose a cost and reveal 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck. If the revealed card has the chosen cost, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +5000 power during this battle.
